category_sources: source_facts.description says these are tools for Multiple Arcade Machine Emulator; official MAME documentation lists external tools such as chdman and imgtool.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is rom-tools; source_facts.description identifies the tools as part of MAME.
docs_sources: Official MAME Documentation has a dedicated External Tools section covering tools included in this package.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo enrichment was intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables include MAME tools such as chdman, imgtool, romcmp, and unidasm; official MAME docs describe external tools for CHD and image manipulation.
